info.title: Encore SDK (Publisher + Analytics)
info.description: Merged spec: Publisher SDK + Analytics ingestion.

get.description: Get all available active offers/campaigns across all organizations

parameters.name: userCountry
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'CA'). If not provided, user country will be US.

parameters.name: sdkVersion
parameters.description: SDK version in semver format (e.g., '1.2.3'). If not provided, SDK version will be 1.2.6.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Client platform: android, ios, or web. If not provided, platform will be ios.

parameters.name: variantId
parameters.description: Optional SDUI variant ID to filter creatives by variant assignment

destinationUrl.description: Primary destination URL for the campaign

linkStatus.description: Current validation status of the destination URL

expectedDomain.description: Expected domain of the destination URL

items.description: Step-by-step user instructions for completing the campaign offer via this creative. Enables A/B testing of instruction flows.

quickInstructions.description: Short, actionable phrases (max 1-3) that guide users. Examples: "sign up, create registry", "add to cart"

minSdkVersion.description: Minimum SDK version required (null = no minimum)

maxSdkVersion.description: Maximum SDK version supported (null = no maximum)

supportedPlatforms.description: Platforms this creative supports (empty = all platforms)

tooltipText.description: Tooltip text to display on hover in Web SDK offer carousel (null = use default text)

post.description: Search eligible offers for a user with pagination support. Campaigns and creatives are randomized for A/B testing using request_id. Performs abuse checks and returns available campaigns.

attributes.description: Optional user attributes for offer selection

requestId.description: Session ID for deterministic pagination - if not provided, server will generate one

platform.description: Client platform: android, ios, or web

variantId.description: SDUI variant ID from frontend config fetch. If provided, filters creatives by variant assignment. If not provided, no variant filtering is applied.

destinationUrl.description: Primary destination URL for the campaign

linkStatus.description: Current validation status of the destination URL

expectedDomain.description: Expected domain of the destination URL

items.description: Step-by-step user instructions for completing the campaign offer via this creative. Enables A/B testing of instruction flows.

quickInstructions.description: Short, actionable phrases (max 1-3) that guide users. Examples: "sign up, create registry", "add to cart"

minSdkVersion.description: Minimum SDK version required (null = no minimum)

maxSdkVersion.description: Maximum SDK version supported (null = no maximum)

supportedPlatforms.description: Platforms this creative supports (empty = all platforms)

tooltipText.description: Tooltip text to display on hover in Web SDK offer carousel (null = use default text)

hasMore.description: Whether there are more offers available

requestId.description: Session ID used for randomization - use this for subsequent pagination requests

post.description: Create a new transaction for a specific campaign

allowedDomain.description: Domain where token can be activated

post.description: Send a grant signal (provisional or final). Must be idempotent.

get.description: Get verification status for a transaction

post.description: Revoke all entitlements for a user. Sets revoked_at timestamp on all transactions with entitlements. Useful for testing.

all.description: All accumulated entitlements (combines verified + provisional with full original values)

get.description: Get accumulated entitlements for a user, separated by provisional and verified status

all.description: All accumulated entitlements (combines verified + provisional with full original values)

get.description: Check if a user has active entitlements. Server-to-server only - requires HMAC authentication. HMAC signature covers query string.

all.description: All accumulated entitlements (combines verified + provisional with full original values)

post.description: Report a client-side error from the SDK. API key is optional.

get.description: Get server-driven UI configuration for the SDK. Returns the active variant based on weighted selection and SDK version compatibility, plus app UI configuration (text/color vars). Same user ID always returns same variant.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID for deterministic variant assignment

variantId.description: The ID of the selected variant

variantName.description: The name of the selected variant

minSdkVersion.description: The minimum SDK version required for this variant

sduiConfig.description: SDUI variant info and layout configuration

appName.description: App name for template substitution (e.g., 'Tinder Plus')

entitlementValue.description: Entitlement value for template substitution (e.g., '1' for '1 month')

message.description: Reason why no variant is available

appName.description: App name for template substitution (e.g., 'Tinder Plus')

entitlementValue.description: Entitlement value for template substitution (e.g., '1' for '1 month')

get.description: Get unified SDK configuration including SDUI, entitlements, experiments, and remote config. This endpoint replaces /ui-config with a cleaner structure. Entitlement mode is implicit: if entitlements.iap.productId exists, use IAP mode; otherwise use Native mode.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID for deterministic variant/cohort assignment

minSdkVersion.description: Minimum SDK version for this variant

customHeadline.description: Custom headline text for SDUI variant (falls back to title)

customSubheadline.description: Custom subheadline text for SDUI variant (falls back to subtitle)

productId.description: App Store Connect product ID for Encore purchase

iap.description: IAP config. If productId exists → IAP mode.

durationDays.description: Computed duration in days for SDK logic

native.description: Native/Encore-managed entitlement. Fallback if no IAP.

rolloutPct.description: Percent of eligible users assigned to Treatment

assignmentVersion.description: Epoch identifier. Change resets cohort assignments.

enabled.description: Kill switch. If false, all users go to Control.

ncl.description: NCL experiment config. Null if not configured.

post.description: Initialize user (idempotent). Called on SDK init to ensure user exists. Returns canonical UUID.

userId.description: User ID from SDK (anonymous UUID or identified)

isNew.description: True if user was created, false if already existed

patch.description: Update user identity (anonymous→identified). Updates the user's app_user_id. Called when developer calls SDK.identify() after login.

post.description: Link Apple Account to subscription chain (appTransactionId ↔ originalTransactionId). Idempotent: updates last_observed_at if exists. Used for NCL attribution via webhooks.

appTransactionId.description: Apple's appTransactionID (stable per Apple Account per app)

firstObservedAt.description: When this link was first created

isNew.description: True if this is a new link, false if existing was updated

get.description: Generate an ECDSA signature for a StoreKit 2 promotional offer purchase. Requires a subscription key and bundle ID to be configured in the publisher portal.

post.description: Ingest analytics events (single or batch). Validates with Zod and enqueues to Kafka.
